name: Lennar Corporation
description: Founded in 1954 and headquartered in Miami, Florida, Lennar Corporation is one of the nation's leading homebuilders. The company operates in many of the most desirable real estate markets across the United States, focusing on building quality homes for all generations. Lennar is recognized for its "Everything's Included" approach, which simplifies the home-buying process by incorporating popular features and upgrades into the base price of its homes. Beyond homebuilding, the company is also involved in financial services, including mortgage, title, and closing services, providing a comprehensive experience for its customers.
